reviews.comment:
los playeros excelentes. las chicas del serviclub atentas y serviciales. lindo lugar para hacer un alto en la huella

The beachgoers were excellent. The service center staff were attentive and helpful. A nice place to stop along the way.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Exelente lugar atención de 10! Lugar limpio impecable algo que destacó el colchón comodicimo de 10. El desayuno está incluido

Excellent place, great service! Clean and impeccable. The most notable thing was the super comfortable mattress, a 10/10. Breakfast is included.
